full_text:
Cheng Cui 成倅
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Cui (成倅). Brother of Cheng Ji, lured Zhuge Dan into an ambush and took part in killing Cao Mao. Cheng Cui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cheng Cui lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
